# skillz Full Stack Software Engineering Co-Op Interview Preparation

Prepare for your skillz Full Stack Software Engineering Co-Op internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Las Vegas, NV
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from skillz
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

skillz is offering a Full Stack Software Engineering Co-Op internship position in Las Vegas, NV. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research skillz's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your skillz interview and increase your chances of success.
